title: Prodige's Skills
description: Level up, and conquer new challenges with this plugin-style skills system!
body:
![thumbnail](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/645b674db71efe843972219bb01e564b94b17420_0.webp)
# Prodige's Skills – The Ultimate Minecraft Skill System!

Take your Minecraft experience to the next level with **Prodige's Skills**, a fully customizable skill system inspired by RPG servers! Level up your abilities, earn rewards, and push your progression beyond limits with prestiges and boosters!  

## **Main Features**  

## **Skills**

Train and master **5 skills**:  
- ⛏️ **Mining** 
- 🌲 **Foraging**
- 🏺 **Excavation** 
- ⚔️ **Combat**
- 🌾 **Farming**
---
## **How to Open the UI?**

Simply use the following command:  

`/trigger Skills`

This will open the skill interface where you can track your progress, buy boosters, and customize your settings!  

![main page](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4e23b6b56360c3c9f819a40678bb595cade9d5b5.png)

## **Boosters**

Want to level up faster? Purchase **XP and point boosters** from the shop and accelerate your progress!  


## **Prestige System**

When you reach **Level 100** in a skill you can reset your progress, but grants **permanent buffs** for even more powerful abilities!  

![progress](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/19d2fc2e93d41f7aa9fc6bba0d2f276db0e40786.png)

## **Fully Customizable**

Each player can fine-tune their experience with the **preferences menu**, allowing full personalization.  

![preference](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c7dad09828f075609be636841c48962c1f6ca474.png)

## ⚙️ **Configuration & Customization**

Want to modify rewards, XP gains, or skill actions? Everything is customizable inside:  

📂 **`Prodiges Skills.zip\data\prodiges_skills\functions\config`**  

All configuration files use simple `dictionaries` and `lists` types. Just edit them while keeping the correct structure!  

![tasks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/22d4173c1fd36ae03e6c9d76ec34ac7b25435a73.png)

---

**Start your journey now and discover more in-game!**  

## Uninstalling
1. Access the Chat Window.
2. Enter the Uninstall Command and press Enter: 
`
/function prodiges_skills:uninstall
`
